mainEntity.name: Cost comparison: DIY vs agency AI visibility for Houston lawyers?
mainEntity.text: Cost comparison: DIY vs agency AI visibility for Houston lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: DIY: $500/mo (tools/time); Agency: $6k/mo (audits/content/PR). Agencies deliver 3x faster ROI via expertise.

suggestedAnswer.text: Houston DIY uses free audits, manual dirs ($50/mo tools). Agencies provide guaranteed citations, saving 20+ hours/week. Break-even at 2 clients. Small firms DIY first, scale to agency. Track ROI via lead forms. Hidden DIY cost: Opportunity from poor execution.

name: DIY vs Agency Costs in Houston
description: DIY: $500/mo (tools/time); Agency: $6k/mo (audits/content/PR). Agencies deliver 3x faster ROI via expertise.
